title: Las Vegas's Perfect Weekly Pool Maintenance Service to Hire in 2022
author: Clean Living Pool and Spa
excerpt: Clean Living Pool and Spa offers weekly pool maintenance services in Las Vegas, providing professional cleaning, chemical balancing, and repair services since 2012. The company helps pool owners maintain their pools with three service tiers starting at $150 per week.
body:
Las Vegas' Best Weekly Pool Maintenance Services to Hire in 2022

Your pool is a source of enjoyment for your clients, family, and friends. To get the most enjoyment out of your pool, you need regular maintenance.

Most pristine pools subscribe to a weekly pool maintenance service.

One of the easiest ways to get the maximum output from your pool is by doing weekly pool maintenance and cleanup.

Las Vegas valley is known for its cool temperatures, a reason why every pool owner should keep their pools in an optimal state.

At Clean Living Pool and Spa, we appreciate our customers in Las Vegas for your contribution towards our fame.

We have had positive reviews from customers since 2012, a year when we launched our services in Las Vegas.

Currently, we are offering weekly swimming pool maintenance services to pool owners in Las Vegas.

Be it you have a residential or commercial pool, we will help you with weekly pool cleanup, maintenance, and repair.

Why You Should Rely on Professionals For Your Weekly Swimming Pool Maintenance

A weekly pool cleanup can be tedious, but lack of it can damage your pool. When you clean your pool regularly, it will last longer.

Moreover, when you rely on professional cleaners for your weekly pool maintenance, you enjoy peace of mind and maximum productivity from your pool.

Specifically, when you rely on professionals from one company, they can be able to identify progressive errors and repair them before they damage your pool.

Here are the advantages of relying on weekly services from professional cleaners:

Peace of Mind

When you hire a company to maintain your weekly pool cleanup, you enjoy peace of mind.

A company employs skilled experts who inspect your pool weekly to check possible errors for repair.

In addition, they are experienced enough to identify even the smallest cracks that might be problematic in the future.

You can even instruct the team on how you need your pool maintenance to be done.

You can choose either weekly or bi-weekly pool cleanup services from a professional pool cleaning company.

You can rest assured that your pool is sparkling clean and blue when you hire professional pool cleaners.

Pool Cleaning on Time

When you hire a professional pool cleaning company, you do not have to worry about your weekly cleaning and maintenance services.

A licensed swimming pool ensures your pool is cleaned weekly and all repairs are done on time before they escalate.

In addition, weekly cleaning ensures your pool hygiene is top-notch, thus attracting more friends and clients.

For instance, Clean Living Home and Spa has helped Las Vegas residents for over 10 years with the following weekly swimming pool services.

  • Economy weekly services
  • Standard weekly services
  • Elite cleaning services

Economy Swimming Pool Cleanup Services

Subscribers to this pricing enjoy the following advantages:

  • Chemical and filter cleaning services
  • Weekly chemical checkup
  • Chemical cleaning of your pool filters (three times a year)

Standard Pool Cleaning Services

In this subscription, our customers enjoy the following benefits:

  • Pool walls brushing and cleaning
  • Pool netting
  • Chemical checkup and replacement (we have our certified chemicals)
  • Emptying of pump and skimmer baskets
  • Vacuuming your pool
  • Visual inspection of your pool

Elite Swimming Pool Cleaning services

Pool owners who subscribe to this package enjoy the following services:

  • Pool wall and steps brushing
  • Pool netting
  • Chemical checkup and adjustment
  • Skimmer and pump baskets emptying
  • Vacuuming
  • Visual inspection of your pool
  • Filter cleaning (three times a year)

A Company Saves Your Time and Money

While performing DIY pool cleaning can save you time and money, hiring a professional to help you is economical.

With a company, you rest assured that you're not risking anyone's life.

A company saves your time and money by detecting early problems before they damage your pool equipment.

In addition, trained pool cleaners clean, inspect and repair most of your pool equipment regularly.

When your pool equipment is monitored and cleaned regularly, it lasts longer. Any premature wear and tear problems are identified and repaired before they get worse.

A Company Ensures Proper Chemical Balance in Your Pool

The chemical balance in your pool is one of the most difficult tasks for any pool owner.

Improper balance can lead to algae and bacteria growth, affecting the comfort of your clients, friends, and family.

When you hire a company to clean your pool weekly, they balance the PH of your water, increasing the swimming comfort of your pool.

Even though balancing the chemicals personally is effective, relying on a professional company ensures you are doing the process correctly.

What We Do

At Clean Living Pool and Spa, we offer weekly pool cleaning services to pool owners in Las Vegas, NV at friendly and affordable rates.

In fact, we can give you a full-weekly service for as low as $150.

We offer you the following services:

Pool Cleaning

We offer the best weekly pool cleaning services to pool owners in Las Vegas, NV.

Our services include:

  • Wall brushing
  • Chemical balancing
  • Vacuuming
  • Surface skimming

We also ensure your water is balanced to improve the life of your pool equipment and interior finish.

During each visit, our technicians will sign service records at your property.

Filter Cleaning

We also wash your filters chemically, using chemicals approved by the NSPF.

A pool's filter captures and removes dirt and debris from your pool.

However, most filters accumulate a lot of materials with time, which should be removed professionally.

To keep your filters in shape and functioning, we use chemicals to clean and maintain your pool's filters.

Chemicals minimize the chances of developing cracks in your cartridge filters.

The longer you maintain your filters clean, the more you save your time, energy, and money.

The Perfect Weekly Pool Maintenance Service to Hire in 2022

If you want your pool clean and sparkling blue on a fine sunny day here in Las Vegas, consider hiring professional cleaners from Clean Living Pool and Spa.

We can help you reap the benefits of having a well-maintained pool.

Since 2012, we take pride in offering the best and most reliable pool cleaning services in Las Vegas, NV.

Contact us today to enjoy our weekly pool cleaning services in Las Vegas, NV.

We have fantastic options for pool cleaning and repair in the entire valley.
